label: Besöksstatistik — Plausible
summary: Privacy-friendly page-view analytics via Plausible. Drops a single <Script src="https://plausible.io/js/script.js" data-domain={NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN} /> into the root layout. Self-hosted Plausible installations override the script host via NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_API_HOST. No cookies, no consent banner required, no PII collected — runs in production only and skips dev/preview when domain is unset. Use as a privacy-focused alternative to vercel-analytics; defaultForCapability=false so vercel-analytics wins on Vercel-hosted projects unless the brief explicitly asks for Plausible.
summarySv: Besöksstatistik med fokus på integritet via Plausible — inga kakor och ingen samtyckesruta behövs. Välj det när du hellre vill ha Plausible än hostingens inbyggda statistik; utan nycklar stänger blocket av sig självt helt (ingen demoyta), vilket är det förväntade beteendet.

envVars.purpose: Site domain registered in Plausible (e.g. 'bonan-och-boken.se'). Found under Site Settings → General. The script disables itself client-side when this value is empty so missing config never crashes the build.
Optional self-hosted Plausible URL (e.g. 'https://analytics.example.com'). Defaults to 'https://plausible.io' when unset. Only set this if you self-host Plausible — leave empty for the SaaS offering.

notes: Hard dossier example for new authors. Mounts as a sibling to the existing vercel-analytics dossier on the analytics capability. Uses NEXT_PUBLIC_* keys because the script attribute is read client-side; both keys are intentionally non-secret (they ship in the page source by design).
